subject: Top remote Go jobs this week
text: Here are this week's top remote Go engineer opportunities: Senior Backend at Acme Corp ($150k-$180k), Platform Engineer at ScaleUp ($140k-$160k), and more. Click to view all listings and set up job alerts.

subject: Application received - Backend Engineer
text: Thank you for applying to the Backend Engineer position at NovaTech. We have received your application and our team will be in touch once we have reviewed all candidates. You can track your application status in our candidate portal.

subject: Your application outcome - Platform Engineer
text: Dear applicant, thank you for your interest in the Platform Engineer role at CloudBase. After careful review, we have decided not to move forward with your application at this time. We will keep your profile on file for future opportunities.

subject: Update on your NovaTech application
text: Hi, we appreciate the time you invested in applying to NovaTech. After reviewing all applications, we regret to inform you that we will not be progressing with your candidacy for the Backend Engineer role. We encourage you to apply again in the future.

subject: Application confirmation - Senior Go Engineer
text: Hi, we have successfully received your application for the Senior Go Engineer position at FinEdge. Our recruiting team reviews applications on a rolling basis and will reach out within two weeks if your profile is a match. Thank you for your interest in joining our team.

subject: Interview invitation - Staff Engineer
text: Hi there, we came across your profile and were impressed by your background in distributed systems. We would love to invite you to an initial technical interview for our Staff Engineer opening at DeepLabs. Please reply with your availability for a 45-minute call next week.

subject: You appeared in 9 searches this week
text: Your profile appeared in 9 recruiter searches this week. Skills in demand: Go, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL. 2 recruiters saved your profile. Consider updating your headline to attract more relevant opportunities.

subject: Next steps - Senior Go Engineer interview
text: Great news! After reviewing your application we would like to invite you to a technical interview for the Senior Go Engineer role at FinEdge. The first round will be a 60-minute systems design session. Please use the link below to schedule a time that works for you.

subject: Your invoice for February 2025
text: Your invoice for February 2025 is ready. Total charges: $51.10 for compute and storage. Your payment method on file will be charged on March 10. Log in to your dashboard to view the full invoice breakdown.

subject: Exclusive opportunity - Principal Engineer role
text: Hi, I represent a Series C fintech company looking for a Principal Engineer to lead their platform team. Compensation range is $200k-$240k plus equity. The role is fully remote. If you are open to exploring this, I would love to set up a quick intro call this week.

subject: Your FinEdge application - final update
text: Hi, thank you for taking the time to interview with our team for the Senior Go Engineer position. After thorough consideration, we have decided to move forward with another candidate whose experience more closely aligns with our current needs. We genuinely enjoyed speaking with you and wish you the best in your search.

subject: Staff Engineer position - decision
text: Thank you for your interest in the Staff Engineer role at DeepLabs and for the time you spent in our interview process. After careful evaluation we have chosen to proceed with a different candidate at this stage. We were impressed by your technical depth and will keep your details on file should a suitable role open up.
